title: dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. incarnata
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. incarnata, commonly known as the British marsh orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the genus Dactylorhiza. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. incarnata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. incarnata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
